# CWE-319 — Cleartext Transmission of Sensitive Information (vulnerable)
lang: go
file: CWE-319-vulnerable.go
---
package sample

import (
	"encoding/json"
	"net/http"

	"github.com/gin-gonic/gin"
)

type cardPayload struct {
	Number string `json:"number"`
	CVV    string `json:"cvv"`
}

// Vulnerable: serves PAN/CVV over plain HTTP listener.
func StartPaymentsAPI(r *gin.Engine) {
	r.POST("/pay", func(c *gin.Context) {
		var p cardPayload
		_ = json.Unmarshal([]byte(c.PostForm("payload")), &p)
		c.JSON(200, gin.H{"charged": true})
	})
	_ = http.ListenAndServe(":8080", r)
}
